fact: A day on Venus is longer than a year on Venus.
Octopuses have three hearts.
Honey can last for thousands of years when it is sealed and stored properly.
Bananas are berries, but strawberries are not classified as true berries.
The Eiffel Tower can grow slightly taller in hot weather because metal expands when it warms.
Sharks existed before trees did.
The human body has more bacterial cells than human cells.
A group of flamingos is sometimes called a flamboyance.
Sound travels faster through water than through air.
The first computer mouse was made of wood.
Wombat droppings are cube-shaped.
The Moon is slowly moving away from Earth.
Some turtles can breathe through specialized body parts while underwater.
The word alphabet comes from the first two letters of the Greek alphabet: alpha and beta.
Lightning is much hotter than the surface of the Sun.
A blue whale's heart is about the size of a small car.
The shortest war in recorded history lasted less than an hour.
Cows have best friends and can become stressed when separated from them.
There are more possible chess games than atoms in the observable universe.
Pineapples take about two years to grow.
The Great Wall of China is not one continuous wall, but a series of walls and fortifications.
Dolphins have names for each other using unique whistles.
The Library of Congress is the largest library in the world by collection size.
A sneeze can travel out of the body at high speed.
The smell after rain is called petrichor.
The heart of a shrimp is located in its head.
Camels have three eyelids to help protect their eyes from sand.
Glass is made mostly from sand.
Some bamboo plants can grow more than three feet in a single day.
The Statue of Liberty was a gift from France to the United States.
Polar bear skin is black, even though their fur looks white.
The word robot comes from a Czech word meaning forced work.
A bolt of lightning can contain enough energy to light a bulb for months, but it lasts for only a tiny moment.
The Pacific Ocean is larger than all of Earth's land areas combined.
Sea otters often hold hands while sleeping so they do not drift apart.
The fingerprints of koalas are very similar to human fingerprints.
The first oranges were not the bright orange color most people know today.
Earth is the only planet not named after a Roman or Greek god.
A group of crows is called a murder, though scientists usually call it a flock.
The average cloud can weigh hundreds of thousands of pounds because water droplets add up.
Some metals are so reactive that they can fizz or even burst into flame in water.
An ostrich's eye is bigger than its brain.
The word trivia comes from a Latin word connected to crossroads.
The first known pencils were made with graphite, not lead.
Most of the oxygen we breathe is produced by tiny ocean organisms.
Rabbits can see nearly all the way around themselves without turning their heads.
The longest place name in the world has more than 80 letters.
The world's largest desert is Antarctica, because deserts are defined by dryness, not heat.
Mantis shrimp can see types of light humans cannot see.
The first email was sent in the early 1970s.
